fields.label: Carrier Name
fields.description: Display name of the shipping carrier (e.g., FedEx, DHL, UPS)

fields.label: Carrier Code
fields.description: Unique code for the carrier (e.g., FEDEX, DHL, UPS)

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Whether this carrier is active and can be selected for shipments

fields.label: Is Default
fields.description: Set as the default carrier for new shipments

fields.label: Carrier Type
fields.options:
Courier
Freight
Postal
Express
Specialized
Local Delivery
Other
fields.description: Type of carrier - Courier (package), Freight (large cargo), Postal, Express, etc.

fields.label: Service Methods
fields.description: Available shipping methods (one per line: Ground, Air, Sea, Express, Economy, etc.)

fields.label: Supports Tracking
fields.description: Whether this carrier provides shipment tracking

fields.label: Supports COD
fields.description: Whether this carrier supports Cash on Delivery

fields.label: Supports Insurance
fields.description: Whether this carrier offers shipping insurance

fields.label: Contact Person
fields.description: Primary contact person at the carrier

fields.label: Email
fields.description: Contact email address

fields.label: Phone
fields.description: Contact phone number

fields.label: Website
fields.description: Carrier's official website

fields.label: Address
fields.description: Carrier's main office address

fields.label: City
fields.description: City of main office

fields.label: Country
fields.description: Country of main office

fields.label: Postal Code
fields.description: Postal/ZIP code of main office

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Tenant for multi-tenant isolation (empty for global carriers)

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: Is Global
fields.description: Global carriers are visible to all tenants

fields.label: Domestic Only
fields.description: Carrier only operates within a single country

fields.label: Service Countries
fields.description: Countries where carrier operates (one country code per line, leave empty for worldwide)

fields.label: Excluded Countries
fields.description: Countries where carrier does not operate (one country code per line)

fields.label: Service Regions
fields.description: Specific regions or zones serviced (e.g., Europe, North America, Asia-Pacific)

fields.label: Has API Integration
fields.description: Whether carrier API integration is available

fields.label: API Provider
fields.options:
Direct
EasyPost
Shippo
ShipStation
AfterShip
ShipEngine
Yurtici
Aras
MNG
PTT
Surat
Other
fields.description: API integration provider (Direct or via aggregator)

fields.label: API Version
fields.description: API version (e.g., v1, v2)

fields.label: API Endpoint
fields.description: Base URL for API calls

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for authentication

fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: API secret for authentication (if required)

fields.label: API Account Number
fields.description: Account/customer number for carrier API

fields.label: API Environment
fields.description: API environment (use Sandbox for testing)

fields.label: API Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Timeout for API requests in seconds

fields.label: Last API Check
fields.description: Last time API connectivity was checked

fields.label: API Status
fields.description: Current API connectivity status

fields.label: API Error Message
fields.description: Last API error message

fields.label: Supports Rate API
fields.description: Carrier API supports real-time rate calculation

fields.label: Supports Label API
fields.description: Carrier API supports shipping label generation

fields.label: Webhook Enabled
fields.description: Enable webhook notifications from carrier

fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: URL to receive webhook notifications

fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Secret key for webhook signature verification

fields.label: Webhook Events
fields.description: Events to receive (one per line: tracking_update, delivered, exception, etc.)

fields.label: Tracking URL Template
fields.description: URL template for tracking (use {tracking_number} placeholder)

fields.label: Tracking API Enabled
fields.description: Use API for tracking updates instead of URL

fields.label: Tracking Update Frequency (min)
fields.description: How often to poll for tracking updates (in minutes)

fields.label: Default Transit Days
fields.description: Default estimated transit time in days

fields.label: Minimum Weight
fields.description: Minimum shipment weight accepted

fields.label: Maximum Weight
fields.description: Maximum shipment weight accepted (0 = no limit)

fields.label: Weight UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for weight

fields.label: Dimensional Divisor
fields.description: Divisor for calculating dimensional weight (L x W x H / divisor)

fields.label: Fuel Surcharge
fields.description: Current fuel surcharge percentage applied to shipments

fields.label: Base Rate
fields.description: Base shipping rate before weight calculations

fields.label: Rate per KG
fields.description: Rate per kilogram (or per weight UOM)

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency for pricing

fields.label: Pricing Notes
fields.description: Additional notes about pricing (zones, surcharges, etc.)

fields.label: Logo
fields.description: Carrier logo (recommended size: 200x200 pixels)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the carrier and services offered

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Sort order for display (lower numbers appear first)

fields.label: Show in Checkout
fields.description: Display this carrier as an option during checkout

fields.label: Featured
fields.description: Highlight this carrier in listings

fields.label: Shipment Count
fields.description: Number of shipments using this carrier

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this carrier (not visible to customers)
